headline: Has The Recent Pullback In Netflix (NFLX) Opened A Valuation Opportunity For Investors?
summary: If you are wondering whether Netflix's current share price reflects its true value, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on that question. After a recent close at US$93.24, the stock has seen a 13.4% decline over the last week and a near flat 0.1% decline over 30 days, while still showing a 2.5% gain year to date and a 190.3% return over three years. Recent headlines around Netflix have focused on its position in the streaming market, including ongoing competition for subscribers...

headline: Netflix announces $25 billion share buyback
summary: Netflix said on Thursday its board has authorized an additional $25 billion share ‌repurchase program, resuming capital returns after the ‌streaming giant walked away from a $72 billion deal to buy Warner ​Bros Discovery's assets.  Its shares rose 1.5% in premarket trading.  The new authorization is on top of a buyback approved in December 2024 and has no expiration date. ‌Netflix had about $6.8 billion ⁠remaining under its previous buyback plan as of March end.
